en: Shouldn't we be helping? There's still a lot more flowers to do, and I know they need more chairs outside.
No, they don't. I'll be fine. I want to give you the rest of that tour.
Okay.
Why does this keep happening to me?
Get out!
Get out? You get out! This is my room and my house!
It's my hairdryer, it's not even for women.
No, I need that!
Okay.
You just ruined the bride's dress.
The sequins ruined the dress. I just spilled wine on it, and I'm not feeling bad about it at all.
You have some real problems.
Yeah, I have some problems.
One, two, three problems. I got forty problems in the front yard, ten in the backyard.
These are people running around my house, but I'm just trying to buck my soulmate,
because that's the way I feel about you.
It's been so long, and I feel like we got this connection going,
but we can't do anything because you're having this wedding!
Look, I'm sorry, let me be honest. I just haven't bucked in like a year and a half, and I'm trying to buck.
Your butt cheeks are driving me insane! Let me buck you!
